interfaces.name: getHomepageHighlights
interfaces.description: Fetch highlighted upcoming retreats, courses, and community events for the homepage hero and highlight sections.

interfaces.name: searchSite
interfaces.description: Global search across retreats, courses, mentors, and events used from the homepage or header search bar.

interfaces.name: getRetreatFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get filter options for the retreats listing page: types, durations, room types, meal plans, and price range hints.

interfaces.name: searchRetreatSessions
interfaces.description: Search scheduled retreat sessions for the retreats listing page using filters and sorting.

interfaces.name: getRetreatSessionDetails
interfaces.description: Fetch full details for a specific retreat session for the retreat detail page.

interfaces.name: getRetreatBookingOptions
interfaces.description: Get booking configuration options (room types, meal plans, date and duration ranges) for a retreat session.

price_modifier.description: Additional price compared to base, per stay or per night.

interfaces.name: quoteRetreatBooking
interfaces.description: Calculate price and validate availability for a retreat booking configuration before confirmation.

interfaces.name: createRetreatBooking
interfaces.description: Create a retreat booking (no payment) with the chosen dates, room type, and meal plan, returning booking details for confirmation screens.

interfaces.name: getCustomRetreatDefaults
interfaces.description: Get default options for the custom retreat builder: allowed lengths, start dates, and room type options.

interfaces.name: getWorkshopFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get filter options for workshops in the custom retreat builder.

interfaces.name: searchWorkshops
interfaces.description: Search optional workshops for inclusion in a custom retreat package.

interfaces.name: saveCustomRetreatPackage
interfaces.description: Save a configured custom retreat package with selected dates, room type, and workshops.

interfaces.name: getCourseFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get filter options for the courses listing page such as levels, price range, and feature flags.

interfaces.name: searchCourses
interfaces.description: Search mystery school courses for the courses listing page using filters and sorting.

interfaces.name: getCourseDetails
interfaces.description: Fetch detailed course information including tiers for the course detail page.

interfaces.name: enrollInCourse
interfaces.description: Enroll a student into a specific course tier via the course detail page.

interfaces.name: getMentorFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get filter options for the mentors listing page, including session lengths and price range suggestions.

interfaces.name: searchMentors
interfaces.description: Search mentors for the mentoring listing page, including filters on session length and price via their 1:1 services.

interfaces.name: getMentorDetails
interfaces.description: Fetch detailed mentor profile information, including services and explicit experience section.

interfaces.name: getMentorAvailability
interfaces.description: Get availability slots for a mentor’s specific service to power the scheduling interface.

interfaces.name: bookMentoringAppointment
interfaces.description: Book a 1:1 mentoring appointment using a selected availability slot.

interfaces.name: getShopCategories
interfaces.description: Get product categories for the shop listing sidebar or tabs.

interfaces.name: getProductFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get filter options for a given product category, such as price and rating ranges.

interfaces.name: searchProducts
interfaces.description: Search products in the shop by category, price, and rating for the shop listing page.

interfaces.name: getProductDetails
interfaces.description: Fetch detailed product information for the product detail page, including variant options.

interfaces.name: addProductToCart
interfaces.description: Add a product with selected options to the shopping cart. Creates a new cart if none exists.

interfaces.name: getActiveCart
interfaces.description: Get the current active cart contents for the cart page, including totals.

interfaces.name: updateCartItem
interfaces.description: Update the quantity of an existing cart item on the cart page.

interfaces.name: removeCartItem
interfaces.description: Remove an item from the cart on the cart page.

interfaces.name: getEventFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get filter options for the events listing page, including event types and price types.

interfaces.name: searchEvents
interfaces.description: Search events for the events listing page, supporting calendar or list views.

interfaces.name: getEventDetails
interfaces.description: Fetch detailed event information for the event detail page and registration form.

interfaces.name: registerForEvent
interfaces.description: Register or RSVP for an event, collecting attendee information and communication preference.

interfaces.name: getLibraryFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get filter options for the media library: content types, categories, tags, duration and rating ranges.

interfaces.name: searchLibraryItems
interfaces.description: Search media library items with filters for type, category/tag, duration, and rating.

interfaces.name: getLibraryItemDetails
interfaces.description: Fetch full details for a specific library item for the detail panel view.

interfaces.name: addLibraryItemToPlaylist
interfaces.description: Add a library item to an existing playlist or create a new playlist if needed.

parameters.name: create_if_not_exists_name
parameters.description: If provided and playlistId is not set, a playlist with this name will be created or reused.

interfaces.name: getPlaylists
interfaces.description: Get a list of user-defined playlists for the 'My Playlists' section.

interfaces.name: getPlaylistDetails
interfaces.description: Fetch a playlist and its items for the playlist detail page.

interfaces.name: getFAQCategories
interfaces.description: Get FAQ categories for the FAQ page navigation and grouping, including accessibility-related topics.

interfaces.name: searchFAQ
interfaces.description: Search FAQ items by keyword and/or category for the FAQ page.

interfaces.name: submitContactMessage
interfaces.description: Submit a message via the contact form, including accessibility & dietary needs questions.

interfaces.name: getAboutPageContent
interfaces.description: Get content for the About page: mission, values, history, key teachers, and service overviews.

helperFunctions.name: _getOrCreateCart
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to get the current active cart from storage or create a new one if none exists.

helperFunctions.name: _recalculateCartTotals
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to recompute cart subtotal, tax estimate, shipping estimate, and grand total after item changes.

helperFunctions.name: _checkRetreatAvailabilityAndPrice
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to validate retreat session availability, compute dates, and calculate final booking price.

helperFunctions.name: _checkEventAvailability
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to verify that there are enough spots remaining for an event before registering attendees.

helperFunctions.name: _checkMentorSlotAvailability
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to verify that a mentor availability slot is still available before creating an appointment.

helperFunctions.name: _createOrGetPlaylistByName
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to find an existing playlist by name or create a new one if it does not exist.

helperFunctions.name: _normalizeDateRangeFilters
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to normalize and validate date range filters (start/end) used across search interfaces.
